/usr/bin/gcc -fPIC -Wall -g -D_POSIX_C_SOURCE=200809L -D_XOPEN_SOURCE=700 -D_GNU_SOURCE -shared -Wl,-soname,libhal.so -o libhal.so "CMakeFiles/hal.dir/src/generic-linux/hal_can_linux.c.o" "CMakeFiles/hal.dir/src/generic-linux/hal_gpio_linux.c.o" "CMakeFiles/hal.dir/src/generic-linux/hal_i2c_linux.c.o" "CMakeFiles/hal.dir/src/generic-linux/hal_serial_linux.c.o" "CMakeFiles/hal.dir/src/generic-linux/hal_spi_linux.c.o" "CMakeFiles/hal.dir/src/generic-linux/hal_watchdog_linux.c.o"  -Wl,-rpath,/home/wanguo/EMS/products/ccm/apps/ccm_collector/build/osal ../osal/libosal.so -lpthread -lrt -lm
